options: The item takes 1× of the leftover space compared to peers
The item can shrink but not grow
The item wraps to a new line
questions.explanation: flex-grow is a ratio: 1 vs 2 gives one item 1/3, the other 2/3 of leftover.

questions.prompt: Two flex items with `flex-grow: 1` and `flex-grow: 2` respectively. If leftover space is 300px, how much does the second item gain?
questions.explanation: Ratio is 1:2. The 300px is split 100 : 200. So .b gets 200px.
`flex: 1` = `1 1 0%`. Common pattern for equal-width flexible columns.

questions.prompt: Make the sidebar fixed at 200px and the main column fill the rest.
